title: Flowerary
description: Hybridize vanilla flowers into new, fun colors and more!
body:
### A repetal of [LDShadowLady's Flower Breeding](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ldshadowladys-flower-breeding) & its continuation [Replanted](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ldshadowladys-flower-breeding-replanted).


```
```


This mod allows you to cross-pollinate vanilla flowers to create different flowers in a variety of colours.

Craft an empty pollen jar to begin, use it to right-click a vanilla flower to collect pollen.

Transfer the pollen onto another vanilla flower to receive seeds.


```
```


The seeds can be planted and farmed like vanilla crops.

Once they are fully-grown you can harvest the flowers to place elsewhere.


```
```


[Join my discord here](https://discord.gg/8gRHcgJ) to follow updates, ask questions, or chat!

The wiki is linked at the top of this page, however it is a WIP and might be for a while.
